textPlain: Listeria found Walmart meatball meals may be linked deadly fettuccine outbreakNever knew listeria bacgeria had such investigating prowess, nor that there's a deadly transmissive disease sharing the name of the popular pasta.I jest of course, though the current CNN headline, which isn't missing the "in", still sounds weird to me.
